_comment: ISSUE-004: per-store tutorial context. Keyed by StoreDefinition.tutorial_context_id. Each step's interactable_id must resolve to an Interactable in the bound scene (validated by tests/gut/test_tutorial_context_validation.gd).

steps.prompt_text: First day. Sal: 'Time card's right by the door — punch in before Vic shows up.'
Confused parent at the counter — figure out which platform their kid actually has.
Sal: 'That title's missing from the rack. Grab it from inventory and put it out.'
Trade-in at the counter. Sal: 'Grade it honest — overgrade and the returns will eat us alive.'
Sports title in the buyback queue. Roster's three years stale — confirm the depreciated offer.
That copy is on hold. A walk-in wants it right now. What do you do?
Quiet customer asking about a red-label cart. Log it — Sal says that's the third one this week.
Shift's over. Close out the register and head home.
